name: session-wake-scheduler
description: Schedules prompts and re-injects them into the mother/origin OpenCode session. Supports once, interval, and daily scheduling modes.

interface.shortDescription: Schedules a prompt back to the origin session
interface.longDescription: Minimal OpenCode plugin that stores delayed prompts, captures the mother session from ToolContext, and later re-injects the prompt into that same session using session.prompt.
